name: NEW_ENTRANTS_BY_TECHCLASS1_2024
description: New entrants by TechnologyClass1 category in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH a, min(y.year) AS first_year,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN y.year = $year THEN p END) AS patent_count_in_year,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN y.year = $year THEN tp END) AS targetpair_count_in_year
WHERE first_year = $year AND patent_count_in_year > 0
RETURN a.name AS assignee, first_year, patent_count_in_year, targetpair_count_in_year
ORDER BY patent_count_in_year DESC, targetpair_count_in_year DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: In 2024, within the Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers TechnologyClass1 category, which companies were new entrants?
Which assignees first appeared in 2024 within the Tumor-Intrinsic Control TechnologyClass1 category?
In 2024, who were the new entrant companies in the Other functional combination TechnologyClass1 category?
